comment: e4: wrecker v1 vs v2 A/B at the standard recipe (w005 + boundary_w 5 + warmup 1). Identical 100k images (train-1m shard 0): e4-v1 trains on the pre-baked v1 wrecked_00 variants; e4-v2 ignores them and synthesizes wreck-v2 damage on the fly from clean.png (fresh recipes every epoch, 12% identity samples, frozen val stream). val_mean is NOT comparable across arms - different damage distributions - so judge on relay bench + hard-commons + the clean-input tax. Secondary purpose: live throughput number for OTF wrecking, which halves the E7 mint if it keeps the 5090 fed.
